JOIN company ON employment.company_id = company.company_id
WHERE company.name = 'Gazprom' AND people.graduation_college = 'Northeastern' AND people.age = 27 AND company.profits_in_billion <= 31.7 AND company.sales_in_billion <= 117.6
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with graduation college equal to 'Northeastern' and age equal to '27', having at least one related employment record (linked on people.people_id = employment.people_id), whose employment record itself has at least one related company record (linked on employment.company_id = company.company_id) with name equal to 'Gazprom' and profits in billion at most '31.7' and sales in billion at most '117.6'?

qa_pairs.question: Who are the people from the United States working exactly one year at Gazprom, where sales are exactly 117.6 billion and profits are at most 31.7 billion?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
JOIN company ON employment.company_id = company.company_id
WHERE company.sales_in_billion = 117.6 AND company.name = 'Gazprom' AND employment.year_working = 1 AND people.nationality = 'United States' AND company.profits_in_billion <= 31.7
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with nationality equal to 'United States', having at least one related employment record (linked on people.people_id = employment.people_id) with year working equal to '1', whose employment record itself has at least one related company record (linked on employment.company_id = company.company_id) with sales in billion equal to '117.6' and name equal to 'Gazprom' and profits in billion at most '31.7'?

qa_pairs.question: Which people named Jerry Corcoran work for Automotive companies with profits of 21.5 billion, sales of 221.9 billion, and a market value of at least 79.5 billion?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN employment ON people.people_id = employment.people_id
JOIN company ON employment.company_id = company.company_id
WHERE people.name = 'Jerry Corcoran' AND company.industry = 'Automotive' AND company.profits_in_billion = 21.5 AND company.market_value_in_billion >= 79.5 AND company.sales_in_billion = 221.9
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with name equal to 'Jerry Corcoran', having at least one related employment record (linked on people.people_id = employment.people_id), whose employment record itself has at least one related company record (linked on employment.company_id = company.company_id) with industry equal to 'Automotive' and profits in billion equal to '21.5' and market value in billion at least '79.5' and sales in billion equal to '221.9'?
